title: Expressions, Decisions, and Iteration · Semantics Case: Loop Selection
summary: Route support cases through explicit rules and iterate changing record sets without truthiness or termination defects. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js loop selection increment in a transparent support-case routing engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose for, while, for-of, or collection operations from iteration meaning, mutation, and termination needs.
Use switch matching, scoped cases, fallthrough, and default behavior deliberately.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
